workflow.name: Backprop: Behavioral Retrospective & Forward Propagation
workflow.critical: The workflow execution engine is governed by: {project-root}/_bmad/core/tasks/workflow.xml
You MUST have already loaded and processed: {installed_path}/workflow.yaml
Communicate all responses in {communication_language} tailored to {user_skill_level}

BACKPROP WORKFLOW: Analyze → Classify → Propagate Sequence: context → observe → review → classify → neurons → gaps → actions → implement → validate → deploy This workflow produces: docs/01-observe/, docs/02-understand/, docs/03-act/, _template/ updates
SOLO SCALE: Calibrated for solo developer projects. No bureaucratic overhead. Stop when signal-to-noise drops. Use DOCK POINTS liberally.
AUTO-PROCEED MODE: Skip all generic "Continue?" confirmations. Only pause at Steps 2, 6, and 9 user gates. All other steps auto-proceed.

step.goal: Load execution context and prior state
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-00-context.md

step.goal: Run analysis scripts and populate docs/01-observe/
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-01-observe.md

step.goal: Human validates raw findings before classification
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-02-evidence-review.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-03-classify.md

step.goal: Write L2 neuron files from confirmed findings
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-04-neurons.md

step.goal: Map L2 neurons to FF-A, FF-B, FF-C prevention layers
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-05-gaps.md

step.goal: Prioritize action items — human approval gate
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-06-actions.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-07-implement.md

step.goal: Validate: smoke test + behavioral health snapshot
step.action: Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-08-validate.md
Load, read completely, and execute steps/step-09-deploy.md
